# Click Cookies — Idle Cookie Clicker Game | Unblocked

> The #1 free cookie game where cookies fall from the sky — catch them, click them, and rack up an insane score! Unlock 21 cookie types, crush 10 levels, earn 21 achievements, and become the legendary Cookie King. 100% free to play, no download, no sign-up.[reference:0]

## Quick Links
- [Play Now](https://clickcookies.com/): Start catching falling cookies instantly in your browser.
- [How to Play](#how-to-play): Learn the basics — click cookies, build combos, buy upgrades.
- [Cookie Varieties](#cookie-varieties): Discover all 21 cookie types from Classic to Void and Infinity.
- [Upgrades](#upgrades-that-change-everything): 10 powerful upgrades including Cookie Magnet, Auto Baker, Time Freeze, and Triple Threat.
- [Achievements](#achievements-to-earn): 21 achievements to unlock — from your first click to a 50x combo.
- [Progression Levels](#progression-levels): Rise from Cookie Rookie to Cookie King across 10 levels.

## How to Play
Mastering Click Cookies is easy to learn and impossible to put down. Follow these steps to become a Cookie King![reference:1]

1. **Start the Game** — Hit the Start Game button in the Cookie Rain Arena. Cookies will immediately begin falling from the top of the screen.[reference:2]
2. **Click the Cookies** — Click or tap each falling cookie before it reaches the bottom. Every cookie you catch earns points — rarer cookies are worth a whole lot more![reference:3]
3. **Build Your Combo** — Click cookies rapidly to stack your combo multiplier. A 10x combo adds massive bonus points per click. Don't let cookies fall — that resets your streak![reference:4]
4. **Buy Upgrades** — Spend your earned points on upgrades like Cookie Magnets, Auto Bakers, Double Dough boosts, and more. Each upgrade makes the game even sweeter.[reference:5]
5. **Earn Achievements** — Unlock 21 achievements for milestones like clicking 1,000 cookies, catching your first Golden Cookie, or reaching a 50x combo.[reference:6]
6. **Reach Cookie King** — Advance through 10 levels from Cookie Rookie all the way to Cookie King. Higher levels unlock rarer cookies, faster spawns, and more falling cookies at once.[reference:7]

## Why Click Cookies is Irresistible
Packed with mechanics that keep every session fresh, competitive, and outrageously fun for players of all ages.[reference:8]

### Cookie Varieties
From everyday classic cookies to mythical Void and Infinity cookies, each rarity tier drops at different rates and rewards you with bigger point bonanzas.[reference:9]
- **21 cookie types** to discover and collect[reference:10]
- Each cookie has its own rarity tier and point value
- Track every cookie you've ever clicked in the in-game catalogue — undiscovered cookies show as mystery entries to drive your collector's spirit[reference:11]

### Combo Multiplier System
Click consecutively to stack your combo counter. A 50x combo awards breathtaking bonus points and triggers a special audio effect to reward your reflexes.[reference:12]

### Progression Levels
Rise from Cookie Rookie through Cookie Baker, Master, Wizard, Sorcerer, and beyond until you claim the throne as Cookie King at Level 10.[reference:13]

## Upgrades That Change Everything
Spend wisely — the right upgrade at the right level can multiply your score by hundreds of times.[reference:14]
- **Bigger Clicks** — Each click earns 50% more points. Stack it 5 times for massive gains[reference:15]
- **Cookie Magnet** — Attracts falling cookies toward your cursor
- **Auto Baker** — Automatically catches cookies for you
- **Time Freeze** — Slows down falling cookies for easier clicking
- **Triple Threat** — Triple your points per click
- **Double Dough** — Doubles all points earned
- And more powerful upgrades to discover[reference:16]

## Achievements to Earn
Challenge yourself to earn every achievement — from clicking your first cookie to reaching a 50x combo or discovering every cookie type in the catalogue.[reference:17]
- 21 unique achievements to unlock[reference:18]
- Milestones include: clicking 1,000 cookies, catching your first Golden Cookie, reaching a 50x combo, and more[reference:19]

## Key Features
- **21 Cookie Varieties** — From Classic to Void and Infinity cookies[reference:20]
- **10 Progression Levels** — Rise from Cookie Rookie to Cookie King[reference:21]
- **21 Achievements** — Earn badges for every major milestone[reference:22]
- **Combo Multiplier System** — Stack combos up to 50x for massive bonus points[reference:23]
- **10 Powerful Upgrades** — Transform your gameplay with magnets, auto-bakers, and more[reference:24]
- **Satisfying Sound Design** — Every click, combo, level-up, and achievement triggers unique Web Audio API tones — crisp, rewarding audio that makes the game feel amazing to play[reference:25]
- **Auto-Save Progress** — Your score, level, upgrades, and achievements save automatically every 15 seconds to your browser. Close the tab and come back — your cookies wait![reference:26]
- **Mobile-Optimised** — Fully touch-friendly and works seamlessly on phones, tablets, and desktops. Play the sweetest game anywhere, anytime[reference:27]
- **Cookie Discovery Catalogue** — Track every cookie type you've ever clicked. Undiscovered cookies show as mystery entries to drive your collector's spirit[reference:28]
- **100% Free to Play** — No download, no sign-up, no hidden costs[reference:29]

## FAQ
- **Is it really free?** Yes — 100% free to play with no downloads, no sign-ups, and no hidden costs.[reference:30]
- **Does it save my progress?** Yes — your score, level, upgrades, and achievements auto-save every 15 seconds to your browser's local storage. Close the tab and come back anytime.[reference:31]
- **Does it work on mobile?** Yes — fully touch-friendly and optimised for phones, tablets, and desktops.[reference:32]
- **How many cookie types are there?** 21 cookie varieties, from everyday classics to mythical Void and Infinity cookies.[reference:33]
- **How many levels are there?** 10 progression levels — from Cookie Rookie to Cookie King.[reference:34]
- **How many achievements can I earn?** 21 achievements for milestones like clicking 1,000 cookies, catching your first Golden Cookie, or reaching a 50x combo.[reference:35]
- **What happens if I let a cookie fall?** Missing a cookie resets your combo streak — so stay focused![reference:36]
- **Are there upgrades?** Yes — 10 powerful upgrades including Cookie Magnet, Auto Baker, Time Freeze, and Triple Threat that transform how you play.[reference:37]
